hero.title: Formula Finder
hero.description: Search bundled formulas, explore clear explanations, and save useful references in your browser.

flow.title: Search → Explore → Copy → Favorite
steps: Search names, formula text, descriptions, and keywords
Copy formulas and save browser-local favorites

differences.title: A focused formula reference in your browser
differences.description: Formula Finder keeps searchable bundled reference data, explanations, and local favorites together.

items.description: Filter a focused reference library across five categories.

feel.title: Move directly from a question to a useful formula
